title: Harbin, Heilongjiang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Harbin, Heilongjiang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Harbin is a city in Heilongjiang with a population of 10,009,000. China’s ice city famous for its spectacular Ice and Snow Festival, Russian-influenced architecture, and bitterly cold winters.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
